info.title: Annature API
info.description: Annature is an Australian-made digital signature platform. This API provides full programmatic access to send, sign, and manage documents online. Built on REST principles with JSON communication.

tags.name: Envelopes
tags.description: Create, send, and manage signing envelopes

get.description: Returns accounts in descending creation order. Max 1000 results.

post.description: Registers a new account and organisation. Partner program only.

get.description: Returns envelopes sorted by creation date descending. Max 1000. Drafts excluded unless status=draft.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Filter by recipient name or email

post.description: Creates a new envelope. By default sends signing emails to eligible recipients.

delete.description: Deletes a draft envelope. Sent envelopes must be voided instead.

post.description: Sends a draft envelope to all eligible recipients.
Voids a sent envelope, cancelling all outstanding signature requests.
Adds a document to a draft envelope.

get.description: Generates a new signing token for accessing the envelope as a specific recipient.

post.description: Creates a new envelope from a predefined template.

get.description: Retrieves attachments for an attachment-type field.

AnnatureAuth.name: X-Annature-Id
AnnatureAuth.description: Public API key. Must also include X-Annature-Key header for private key.

name.description: Full name of the account holder
